text: {"claims":[{"statement":"AI can efficiently process and analyze data, but it may lack the nuanced understanding and creativity inherent in human 2016)","entailment":"The quoted sentence directly states that AI processes data efficiently yet lacks nuanced understanding and creativity, which supports the
